title: Create: Netherite Automation
description: Automate netherite ingots with the create mod.
body:
## **PLEASE READ CHANGELOG BEFORE UPGRADING VERSIONS!**




A Create Addon that lets you automate netherite with the create mod.

## **Requirements:**
**[Create - Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/create)**

Currently the version only runs on version 1.20.1 with forge. The mod contains recipes that might not make sense but are highly effecient.

There might be some combitablity issues with the latest create mod versions but I have already tested this mod on Create 0.5.1j 

## **Process**

**Step 1 - Crushing cobblestone to produce stone**

![Step 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c5b267952d54c86145c81f6176c43b7e5e1f4d7.png)

**Step 2 - Mixing stone and 500ml of lava to produce magma using a superheated mixer.**

![Step 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e2bc602c6f643166af7c67bb2de1614f957a333b.png)

**Step 3 - Mixing magma to produce netherrack using a heated mixer.**

![Step 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/79bd4e960eac8709501ee81b69db061eae4d438b.png)

**Step 4 - Mixing netherrack and 500ml of lava to produce ancient debris using a superheated mixer.**

![Step 4](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c316a0aa473704f67e5a6e9bd640d91607ffe00.png)

**Step 5 - Press ancient debris to produce molten netherite ingot.**

![Step 5](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe67218e0e5dbd4504c0c49179916c1b46330221.png)

**Step 6 - Bulk wash molten netherite ingot to finally produce netherite ingot.**

![Step 6](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c687148fbd787bd381da68c430db33693b619690.png)
